settings.label: Agree to Terms
settings.info: Require customers to accept your terms and conditions before completing their checkout. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/agree-to-terms)

settings.label: Announcement Bar
settings.info: Display important announcements and promotions at the top of your store for visibility. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10435017-how-to-use-the-announcement-bar-widget-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.info: Add a navigation bar for quick and easy access to your store pages and collections. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10446496-how-to-use-the-menu-bar-for-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Multicolumn
settings.info: Display content in multiple columns for a clean, organized, and easy-to-navigate layout. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10448113-how-to-use-the-multicolumn-section-for-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Multirow
settings.info: Display content across multiple rows for a more organized and flexible layout design. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10448115-how-to-use-the-multirow-section-for-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Parallax Image
settings.info: Add depth and motion to your store with visually dynamic parallax scrolling. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10912794-how-to-use-the-parallax-image-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Product Features
settings.info: Draw attention to your product's standout features with interactive hotspots. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10448107-how-to-use-the-featured-image-section-for-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Product Sharing
settings.info: Allow customers to quickly share product links to boost visibility and traffic. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/product-sharing)

settings.label: Product Subscription
settings.info: Auto-billed subscriptions (weekly, monthly, yearly) with built-in discounts. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/product-subscription)

settings.label: Product as Variant
settings.info: Display product variations under one page for a cleaner browsing experience. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/product-as-variant)

settings.label: Product Zooming
settings.info: t:settings_schema.zooming.enable_info

settings.label: Quick Compare
settings.info: Allow customers to compare product features side by side to choose the best option. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/quick-compare)

settings.label: Quick Order List
settings.info: Enable customers to quickly add products to their cart with an easy-to-use variants list. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10448118-how-to-use-the-quick-order-list-for-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Quick View
settings.info: Allow customers to quickly view product details before navigating to the product page. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/quick-view)

settings.label: Scrolling Banner
settings.info: Highlight promotions, flash sales, and updates with a customizable scrolling banner. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10800910-how-to-use-the-scrolling-banner-section-for-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Shipping Checkpoint
settings.info: Verify shipping details at checkout to prevent errors and ensure smooth delivery. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/shipping-checkpoints)

settings.label: Shipping Calculator
settings.info: Allow customers to calculate shipping costs in real-time for a smoother checkout process. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/shipping-calculator)

settings.label: Shoppable Image
settings.info: Make images interactive by tagging products directly for quick shopping. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11703068-how-to-use-the-shoppable-image-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Slideshow Schedule Timeline
settings.info: Easily manage and schedule slides for a dynamic and well-timed display. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/slideshow-schedule)

settings.label: Split Video with Text
settings.info: Showcase your products with a split text and video layout for an engaging display. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10448042-how-to-use-the-split-video-text-section-for-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Stacked Images with Text
settings.info: Show multiple images with captions in a stacked layout to highlight key features. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11702890-how-to-use-the-stacked-images-with-text-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Sticky Image
settings.info: Keep images fixed as customers scroll, ensuring key visuals stay visible throughout. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10454609-how-to-use-the-sticky-image-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Text Columns with Images
settings.info: Combine images and text in a column layout to create engaging and informative sections. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/10448039-how-to-use-the-text-column-with-images-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: TikTok Slider
settings.info: Showcase TikTok videos in a smooth slider to boost engagement and social proof. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11703064-how-to-use-the-tiktok-slider-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Trustpilot Reviews
settings.info: Show your Trustpilot reviews directly on your store to build trust and boost credibility. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11589262-how-to-use-the-trustpilot-reviews-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Timeline
settings.info: Display a chronological list of events or milestones. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11703054-how-to-use-the-welcome-video-widget-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: UGC Carousel
settings.info: Showcase customer video reviews and UGC content in an interactive, scrollable carousel. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/ugc-carousel)

settings.label: Variant Sync on Media Change
settings.info: Updates the selected variant when a product image is clicked for a smoother experience. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11401627-how-to-use-the-variant-sync-on-media-change-widget-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Vertical Ticker
settings.info: Display scrolling messages or updates to grab attention and keep shoppers informed. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11477689-how-to-use-the-vertical-ticker-section-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: Welcome Video
settings.info: Add a welcome video to introduce your brand and connect with visitors instantly. [Learn more](https://help.debutify.com/en/articles/11703054-how-to-use-the-welcome-video-widget-in-the-debutify-theme-version-8)

settings.label: WhatsApp Chat
settings.info: Let customers reach you through WhatsApp for quick support and real-time conversations. [Learn more](https://debutify.com/youtube-redirect/whatsapp-chat)
